title: [P1] WP-11.07 — Investigate negative startup cost before any configured usage

root_cause.summary: Three related defects could allow negative or misleading zero-state cost to surface at startup.

defect_1.description: The zero-state guard used exact equality `cost_usd == 0.0`.  A tiny negative value produced by float drift (or the second defect) would fail the equality check, fall into the `else` branch, and pass through to format_cost_display() which clamps to zero but returns '~$0.000' instead of the clear 'no charges' string.  Result: startup showed '~$0.000' or, before the format_cost_display clamp was added, a literal negative dollar amount.
defect_1.fix: Changed the guard to only format finite, strictly positive values as dollar amounts.  Any zero, negative, NaN, or infinite value now returns 'no charges', matching acceptance criterion #2.

defect_2.description: The legacy cost calculation path lacked a `.max(0.0)` clamp.  If audio_seconds_sent were ever negative (e.g. -325 s from float underflow or counter anomaly) the result would be -0.13 USD — the exact example cited in the issue.  While the main display path bypasses this function (it reads CostCounter::current_estimate_usd() which already has .max(0.0)), the unguarded path remained a latent source of negative values.
defect_2.fix: Changed STT component calculation to `self.audio_seconds_sent.max(0.0) * 0.0004` so a negative audio anomaly cannot offset legitimate translation cost.

defect_3.description: The live CostCounter path also summed raw audio seconds with MT/TTS components before the final non-negative clamp. Negative audio seconds could therefore offset positive translation or TTS usage.
defect_3.fix: Changed the STT component calculation to clamp audio seconds before summing MT/TTS costs.

criterion_1_no_negative_cost_at_startup.evidence: Both CostCounterState::total_usd() and SessionMetrics::recalculate_cost() clamp the STT component before summing. Both paths are tested.

criterion_2_clear_zero_state_string.evidence: format_cost_or_zero_state(0.0) and format_cost_or_zero_state(-0.13) both return 'no charges'.  Snapshots snapshot__status_strip_zero_state_narrow and snapshot__status_strip_zero_state_expanded confirm the TUI shows 'no charges' at startup.

criterion_3_release_path_fix.evidence: The fix is in the shared format helper (cost.rs) used by all display surfaces, and both metrics calculation paths clamp the STT component before summing.

criterion_4_runtime_evidence.evidence: Tests run below confirm runtime behavior.  Snapshot tests exercise the rendered TUI output directly.

test_results.zero_state_negative_cost_returns_no_char: PASS — format_cost_or_zero_state(-0.13) == 'no charges' (regression guard for issue #195 example value)
test_results.recalculate_cost_clamps_negative_to_zero: PASS — SessionMetrics with audio_seconds_sent=-325.0 recalculates to estimated_cost_usd=0.0 (defense-in-depth guard)
test_results.negative_audio_seconds_do_not_offset_pos: PASS — CostCounter with audio_seconds=-325.0 plus 10,000 translated chars returns 0.2 USD, not 0.07 or 0.0
test_results.recalculate_cost_negative_audio_does_not: PASS — SessionMetrics with audio_seconds=-325.0 plus 10,000 translated chars returns 0.2 USD
test_results.snapshot_status_strip_zero_state_narrow: PASS — rendered strip at 60 cols shows 'no charges'
test_results.snapshot_status_strip_zero_state_expande: PASS — rendered expanded metrics shows 'Cost: no charges'
test_results.total_tests_run: cargo test passed: 241 unit/integration tests, 1 soak fixture test, 2 soak runner tests, and 3 WASAPI probe tests; 0 failed

tui_rendered_zero_state.note: Captured from insta snapshot assertions.  All three surfaces show 'no charges' not '~$0.000'.

changes: CostCounterState::total_usd: clamps negative audio seconds before summing with MT/TTS costs
format_cost_or_zero_state: guard condition changed from `cost_usd == 0.0` to finite and strictly positive to catch zero, negative, NaN, and infinite values
Updated doc-comment with expanded examples including -0.13
SessionMetrics::recalculate_cost: clamps negative audio seconds before summing with translation cost

commands_run: rustup run 1.90.0-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu cargo test  [PASS: 241 unit/integration + 1 soak + 2 soak runner + 3 WASAPI probe]
